aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests

1. **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z**
   - **Requester:** johnx1971
   - **Fingerprints:** None
   - **Existing Support:** `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (climate_sensor)
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [Issue #165](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165)

2. **BSEED 2 Button Wall Switch**
   - **Requester:** pjmpessers
   - **Fingerprints:** None
   - **Existing Support:** `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (switch_2gang), `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (switch_3gang, switch_4gang)
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [Issue #1337](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1337)

## Fingerprints Already Supported

- **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z:** `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (climate_sensor)
- **BSEED 2 Button Wall Switch:** `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (switch_2gang), `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (switch_3gang, switch_4gang)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate

No new fingerprints found in forks.

## PRs with Useful Changes

1. **Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices**
   - **Author:** Robsta86
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa`, `_TZE204_qasjif9e`
   - **Status:** Closed (not merged)
   - **URL:** [PR #180](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)

2. **Added TS110E driver**
   - **Author:** PiTRiS87
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [PR #1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)

3. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**
   - **Author:** chernals
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`
   - **Status:** Closed (not merged)
   - **URL:** [PR #1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)

4. **Added 3 new devices**
   - **Author:** Peter-Celica
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)

5. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **Author:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

6. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **Author:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [PR #1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)

7. **Add "_TZE204_bjzrowv2" - Update app.json**
   - **Author:** YuriEstevan
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **URL:** [PR #1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)

## Summary

The recent GitHub activity for Universal Tuya Zigbee includes two new device requests, several PRs with useful changes, and no new fingerprints from forks. The existing fingerprints for the requested devices are already supported, which may simplify integration. The PRs offer various improvements and new device support, awaiting review and merging.
